rulings.Case Title: PURCELL VS ASBESTOS DEFTS*
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION PREMISES OWNER LIABILITY, RETAINED CONTROL GRANT. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION PREMISES OWNER LIABILITY, NEGLIGENT HIRING GRANT. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION PREMISES OWNER DIRECT LIABILITY DENY BURDEN SHIFTED. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT CREATED BY PLAINTIFF PURCELL DECLARATION PAGE 3 LINES 15 TO 23 SEE RAY VS. SILVERADO 98 CAL.APP. 4TH 1120 (2002). (JH)
